mapper.select: SELECT pt.id, pt.name, pt.description, pt.category_id, pt.content, pt.variables, pt.is_builtin, pt.status, pt.created_by, pt.created_at, pt.updated_at, pt.is_deleted, pc.name as category_name FROM prompt_template pt LEFT JOIN prompt_category pc ON pt.category_id = pc.id WHERE pt.id = #{id} AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
